top_factors.title: Missed chances with runners on
top_factors.detail: Cleveland failed to convert enough traffic into runs.

top_factors.title: Late damage decided the night
top_factors.detail: Detroit produced the biggest swings after the middle innings.

player_trends.detail: Reached base and remained the steadiest threat in the lineup.

watch_next.title: What to watch next
watch_next.detail: Watch whether Cleveland can generate more extra-base impact in the next game.
